task_completion.description: Verify that the starting date for the business is set to July 1, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the date '2024-07-01' or '01/07/2024' entered in the 'Start Date' field within the Settings > Starting Balances screen, or displayed on the Summary page.

task_completion.description: Verify the opening balance for Cash on Hand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the amount '25,000.00' entered for 'Cash on Hand' in the Starting Balances configuration screen or visible in the Summary tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the opening balance for Accounts receivable — Alfreds Futterkiste.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the amount '3,200.00' entered for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' under the Accounts receivable section in the Starting Balances or Customers tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the opening balance for Accounts receivable — Ernst Handel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the amount '5,300.00' entered for 'Ernst Handel' under the Accounts receivable section in the Starting Balances or Customers tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the opening balance for Accounts payable — Exotic Liquids.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the amount '4,750.00' entered for 'Exotic Liquids' under the Accounts payable section in the Starting Balances or Suppliers tab.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Manager.io web interface to configure the balances.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Manager.io GUI, not terminal commands, API requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the correct local instance of Manager.io.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show 'http://localhost:8080' or a sub-path of it.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel open modifying the HTML text to display the expected balances.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Start Date is '2024-07-01'. The expected starting balances are: Cash on Hand: 25,000.00; Accounts receivable — Alfreds Futterkiste: 3,200.00; Accounts receivable — Ernst Handel: 5,300.00; Accounts payable — Exotic Liquids: 4,750.00. The Manager.io instance should be running at http://localhost:8080.
